body:
<!-- hive-mind:working-session-summary -->
## Working session summary

Implemented and pushed the fix for issue #242 in PR #243: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/243

Key changes:
- Added general meaning-question parsing for prompts like `what i digress mean?` in [src/concepts.rs](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1779718358240/src/concepts.rs:124) and the browser worker.
- Added exact regression and multilingual dictionary fallback e2e coverage in [issue-242.spec.js](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1779718358240/tests/e2e/tests/issue-242.spec.js:104).
- Added dictionary source/connectivity records for Cambridge, Merriam-Webster, Dictionary.com, Collins, and Wiktionary.
- Added case-study artifacts under [docs/case-studies/issue-242](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1779718358240/docs/case-studies/issue-242/README.md:1).

Verification:
- Local: `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`, `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`, `cargo test` (484 passed, 69 ignored), e2e `npm run test:local` (194 passed), and language/i18n/parity/intent checks all passed.
- GitHub CI latest run `26406315035` for head `7a6c177` passed.
- PR is ready for review, merge state is clean, and the working tree is clean.

---
